name: python3-venusian
title: python3-venusian
description:
library for deferring decorator actions
Venusian is a library which allows framework authors to defer decorator
actions. Instead of taking actions when a function (or class) decorator is
executed at import time, you can defer the action usually taken by the
decorator until a separate "scan" phase.
.
This is the Python 3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-venusian because library for deferring decorator actions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-venusian as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-venusian with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-venusian --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
